# Prep Brainstorming

## Question Ideas

What pain points do users experience? How do they currently solve the problem? What workarounds have they built? Where does their current approach fail?

## Environment Setup

Book a quiet room. Test recording equipment before the call. Have consent forms ready and signed before recording starts.
